candidates.description: Repeated CFB27-owned HTTPS connection during online-gated screens.
Earlier CFB27-owned HTTPS connection during fake anti-cheat/offline run.
CFB27-owned HTTPS connection during Dynasty and multi-mode trigger live traces.

notes: These are proven process-owned CFB27 remotes, not confirmed protocol endpoints.
Do not redirect blindly; TLS/SNI/certificate behavior must be identified first.
The local gateway/logger is for controlled redirect experiments only.
